evidence_confidence.reason: The immutable cut is hash-bound; all 48 unit artifacts match the evidence manifest; all 12 face crops and all 12 96px derivatives were pixel-reproduced exactly from their named masters; all six comparison captures and the Vellum raw/display hashes were directly inspected.

audience_and_intent_fit.evidence: All 12 visibly function as dangerous playable combat units with role-bearing silhouettes, unit-specific survival psychology, villain intent, and physical supernatural cost.
audience_and_intent_fit.benchmark_comparison: Against the locked criteria and approved Vellum-first packet, the group solves the concept-calibration need without asking prose to rescue absent combat or villain reads.
audience_and_intent_fit.consequence: The packet is decision-useful for selecting and carrying Phase 2 unit identities downstream.

craft_and_finish.evidence: Original-resolution masters show controlled anatomy, materially separated cloth/skin/bone/wood/metal, dry weathering, deliberate focal faces, and no visible production-breaking generation artifact.
craft_and_finish.benchmark_comparison: The masters reach the approved Vellum hard-matte standard at a professional concept-art phase, though Vellum retains a higher ceiling in micro-material authorship and ornamental specificity.
craft_and_finish.consequence: No master requires material apology or repair before professional concept lock.

coherence_and_hierarchy.evidence: Each master has one dominant prop or anatomical idea; secondary trait channels remain subordinate, and face/pose/cost reinforce the same active psychology.
coherence_and_hierarchy.benchmark_comparison: The hierarchy follows the locked one-primary-channel rule and remains legible on the contact, face, role, and 96px boards.
coherence_and_hierarchy.consequence: Players and downstream artists can identify the intended primary read without accessory competition.

distinctiveness.evidence: The batch separates architectural penitent, cocoon, flesh keep, ledger mage, ligament mage, ratfolk siphon, alien blade ring, stamp support, slate mentor, wage fist, time-bow predator, and proof-rifle marksman.
distinctiveness.benchmark_comparison: No same-role pair repeats body plan, dominant prop, pose vector, face family, or silhouette architecture; Vellum is used as finish calibration rather than copied costume.
distinctiveness.consequence: The 12 remain roster-recognizable as individual units rather than one generated costume aisle.

completeness_and_downstream_usability.evidence: Every unit has three rough options, one selected master, a same-master face crop, an exact 96px derivative, ten-field psychology, trait channels, nearest neighbors, and hash-bound provenance.
completeness_and_downstream_usability.benchmark_comparison: The packet exceeds a typical concept handoff by binding source, derivative, comparison, and psychology evidence into deterministic review artifacts.
completeness_and_downstream_usability.consequence: The cut is auditable and usable for later concept lock, implementation planning, and revalidation.

silhouette_and_96px_readability.evidence: At native 96x96, every unit preserves a unique dominant mass or vector; the role-grouped lineup exposes no identity collision.
silhouette_and_96px_readability.benchmark_comparison: The exact derivatives meet the locked no-redrawing board-read gate and preserve the documented hooks under severe reduction.
silhouette_and_96px_readability.consequence: All 12 can proceed without a board-scale silhouette redesign.

psychology_and_villain_read.evidence: Same-master crops expose directed eyes or nonhuman facial mechanisms, specific mouth/jaw/brow tension, and visible contradiction that agrees with each full-body pose.
psychology_and_villain_read.benchmark_comparison: The faces avoid a universal angry or neutral-model family and meet the Morwen/Vellum/Creep specificity anchors at the declared concept phase.
psychology_and_villain_read.consequence: The units read as authored antagonists with distinct survival strategies rather than generic classes.

production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.evidence: Dominant props and anatomy are traceable, physically attached, pose-compatible, and separated from secondary trait channels; exact derivative provenance is reproducible.
production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.benchmark_comparison: The designs meet the locked one-dominant-idea and embodied-magic conventions without relying on detached VFX or a second competing weapon.
production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.consequence: No concept carries an unresolved anatomy, prop, or trait-channel ambiguity that would block downstream production.

visible_face_evidence.want: Recognition that his compulsory suffering was necessary.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: That others can survive without him and invalidate his penance.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Steal wounds and make protection morally indebted.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The fixed upward eye and withheld jaw turn martyrdom into coercion.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Bowed head, one direct eye, compressed mouth, burdened shoulders, and low demanding open hand.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The fused reliquary yoke is visibly anchored through both shoulders; asymmetrical calcification and the open hand remain anatomically coherent.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Broken arch, bowed giant mass, planted feet, and pale chest wound survive.

visible_face_evidence.want: Seal and possess the chosen contents.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The enclosure behaves like closing jaws rather than passive armor.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Narrow purple sensory slit, pinched shell seams, asymmetric forward plates, grimacing core, and planted pillar legs.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: Nested shell plates, bound core, and pillar legs form one coherent enclosure organism with no carried shield.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: The oval cocoon and pillar legs read immediately and do not collapse into Korath or Malachor.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Controlled proprietary invitation over contained unease.
visible_face_evidence.want: Have the viewer accept acquisition as safety.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: A blank memory she cannot price.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Classify, contract, and own before loss can recur.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: Warmth is transactional; the raised inked hand and ledger already claim the viewer.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Asymmetric mouth invitation, one sharper appraising eye, opposite brow/eye tension, tight jaw, and ledger held across the torso.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The ledger is supported against the torso by a traceable arm and hand; the opposite casting arm is independent and anatomically plausible.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Narrow authority column, pale ledger block, and raised dark casting hand survive.

visible_face_evidence.want: Be rewarded and accepted long enough to steal identity.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Adapt to the room before the room fixes an identity.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The smile solicits trust while the siphon hand is already invading space.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Single scanning eye, adaptive half-smile, forward head, deferential torso fold, and overextended ampoule fingers.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The elongated siphon hand, arm, split tails, and loaded legs are coherently attached and support the dash line.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Forward wedge, long amber fingers, and trailing tails remain distinct.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Feral delight split by temporal pain.
visible_face_evidence.want: Spend multiple futures without accepting a final timeline.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The target-fixed grin treats deaths as expendable rehearsal timelines.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Asymmetric aged halves, narrowed eyes, uneven mouth tension, compressed crouch, and bowstring crossing the face.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The spine/wing-finger time-bow, strings, hands, and crouched body form one readable ranged anatomy; no second weapon competes.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Long bow arc, batlike ear/head wedge, membrane mass, and crouch survive.

visible_face_evidence.want: Approach without being known or claimed.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Erase identity traces and remove witnesses.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The mouthless face and closing blade ring make alienation procedurally predatory.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Hollow eyes, slight head cant, erased mouth, low loaded limbs, and inward-curving matte ribbons.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: Blade ribbons emerge coherently from the back/spine region and encircle a stable four-limb crouch.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Pale oval head, low triangular body, and radial black blade ring survive.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Courteous welcome with clinical predatory measurement.
visible_face_evidence.want: Control every exchange before care creates debt.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The service smile accompanies a precise branding action.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Controlled smile, narrowed measuring eye, eyelid scars, ready jaw, and weight placed over the stamp.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The short one-ended receipt stamp is visibly pressed against a marked plate on the judgment block; both hands and the contact point are coherent, and it does not read as a cane or staff.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Compact goblin plus large marked block and short contact tool survive; the pose does not become a hammer swing.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Favored-pupil approval constrained by fear and nerve pain.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Offer partial truth and withhold the final step.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: Approval and correction arrive together as ownership.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Pinned viewer gaze, one correcting brow, quiet approving lips, rigid jaw, raised directive hand, and inflamed facial/neck nerves.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The small slate is held vertically at the side as an instructional board with visible writing and no stock, trigger, bow, bracing, or aiming line; waist tools remain subordinate.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Lean directive figure, side rectangle, nerve crown, and open correction hand survive without a weapon silhouette.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Controlled grievance with anticipated physical relief.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: A complex problem will expose helplessness.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: Restraint channels humiliation into the next body.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Targeted eyes, compressed lips, asymmetric cheek tension, jaw aligned behind the loaded arm, and one forward fist vector.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: One oversized wage-stamp fist with three plates owns the action line; the smaller hand is subordinate and no shield or second weapon remains.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Huge plated fist, barrel torso, wide stance, and subordinate trailing hand survive.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Invitation split by cool surveillance and fear of comparison.
visible_face_evidence.want: Keep both parties dependent on her mediation.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The parties will compare accounts and exclude her.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Control what each side is allowed to perceive.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The open palm offers safety while the divided eyes monitor a second vector.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Exactly two gaze pairs, open inviting palm, sideways surveillance, lower-lid/throat tension, split stance, and one taut diagonal ligament.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: Exactly one fibrous ligament runs as a single continuous palm/wrist-to-opposite-heel structure; the free hand is empty and no duplicate ribbon or prop competes.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Lean split stance and one dominant diagonal ligament remain unmistakable.

visible_face_evidence.want: Immediate tissue maintenance without confronting collapse.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: One unpaid moment will disintegrate the fortress.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Make debtor bodies maintain his continuity.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The central face demands rather than pleads while embedded debtors become material.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Wide unequal eyes, demanding open mouth, hand at tightening chest clock, subordinate faces, and clamp opening toward one lower-right target.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The mortised clamp is attached by a readable articulated limb on the lower right and shares the target line with the central face and chest clock.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Square crenellated mass, central panic face/clock, and lower-right clamp survive.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Cold moral satisfaction over tightly suppressed doubt.
visible_face_evidence.want: Force an undeniable proof from the target.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: Contradiction will dissolve the certainty-based self.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Turn grievance into evidence and people into confirming targets.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The slight satisfied mouth and appraising off-axis eyes reduce the target to proof.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Controlled half-smile, one narrowed/scarred eye, tension in the opposite cheek, stable cheek weld, and full-body rifle line.

per_unit.anatomy_and_prop: The extreme footnote rifle is held coherently with two hands and shoulder support; proof strips remain integrated and no sidearm competes.
per_unit.exact_96px_read: Long horizontal rifle, narrow standing wedge, and pale face remain distinct from Nyxa's curved bow mass.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Active asymmetric hostile enclosure and prey selection must read before egg/armadillo; shell must be dry.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The master and face crop show forward-closing unequal shell plates, a narrowed target-facing slit, bound core, and planted advance. The shell has dry micro-crackle and diffuse edge light without a wet or polished read.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when the silhouette reads as a closing organism at master and 96px and the surface remains low-sheen against Vellum.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Proprietary warmth and concealed memory panic coexist from face and pose.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The small asymmetric mouth invitation and raised contract hand provide warmth; the mismatched eye focus, brow pinch, jaw restraint, and ledger barrier carry concealed panic/control.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when both acquisition invitation and memory anxiety are visible without prose and agree with the ledger/hand pose.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Receipt-stamp contact reads before hammer/staff/cane and selected B rough corresponds.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The short stamp is visibly touching the marked plate on the portable judgment block; no swing arc exists. The upright B rough and master share the same block-facing execution-clerk column.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when the contact mechanic is visible in the master, the 96px read does not become a staff/cane, and B correspondence holds.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Favored-pupil approval, ownership, fear, and restrained nerve pain coexist; selected A rough corresponds; slate cannot read as shield/crossbow/weapon.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The face combines approving lips, direct pupil gaze, correcting brow, rigid jaw, and visible nerve fissures. The A rough and master share an open directive hand plus side-held written slate; the slate lacks weapon furniture or aim.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when all four emotional forces remain visible and the slate reads as instruction at master and 96px.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Grievance and restraint include anticipated relief; one-target fist line preserved.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: Targeted eyes, compressed lips, slight asymmetric cheek release, aligned jaw, and the single oversized forward fist create restrained grievance moving toward relief at impact.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when the face is more specific than generic anger and no second prop or competing action vector appears.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Two gaze pairs establish invitation and surveillance plus fear of comparison; exactly one ligament.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: Four eyes form two readable gaze pairs, the open palm invites, the second gaze surveils laterally, and lower-face/throat tension carries comparison fear. One continuous diagonal ligament connects the forward limb to the opposite heel.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when both social vectors and fear are visible and only one body-integrated connector dominates.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Entitled payment demand and collapse panic share one lower-right target with clamp.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The central face combines a demanding mouth with widened panic eyes; the chest-clock hand and attached lower-right clamp converge on the same maintenance target/action.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when panic, entitlement, clock, and clamp share one coherent target line.

round_3_closure_test_dispositions.criterion: Cold moral satisfaction and suppressed doubt replace revenge/tactical concentration.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.evidence: The face shows a controlled satisfied mouth, off-axis evidentiary appraisal, narrowed scarred eye, and opposite-cheek tension; the rifle line remains calm and prosecutorial rather than revenge-driven.
round_3_closure_test_dispositions.closure_test: Passes when satisfaction and denied contradiction are both visible and generic soldier/revenge anger does not control the face.

vellum_anchor_confirmation.renderer_source_evidence: tools/art/render_phase2_comparison_boards.py names only the approved raw anchor and vellum_10pct_real_deshine_cutout_final.png for display.

units.korath: Fused shoulder yoke and asymmetrical calcified body remain traceable.
units.veyra: Nested shell, bound core, and pillar legs form one enclosure anatomy.
units.cashmere: Ledger support arm and separate casting arm are traceable.
units.pilfer: Siphon hand, tails, and loaded limbs are coherent.
units.nyxa: Spine/wing bow and firing anatomy are integrated.
units.creep: Blade ribbons attach to the back/spine and support the crouch.
units.knoll: Short stamp visibly contacts one marked block; no cane/staff swing.
units.quillith: Side slate is instructional, non-weapon, and subordinate waist tools do not compete.
units.kett: One wage fist owns the line; no shield or second weapon.
units.luna: Exactly one continuous ligament is present.
units.malachor: One articulated lower-right clamp is attached and target-aligned.
units.sable: One long rifle is supported by two hands and shoulder; no sidearm.

per_unit_reads.korath: Broken arch, bowed giant, planted feet.
per_unit_reads.veyra: Closed oval cocoon and pillar legs.
per_unit_reads.cashmere: Narrow authority column, ledger, raised hand.
per_unit_reads.pilfer: Forward wedge, long siphon fingers, tails.
per_unit_reads.nyxa: Bat head/crouch and huge curved time-bow.
per_unit_reads.creep: Pale head, low crouch, radial blade ring.
per_unit_reads.knoll: Compact operator, judgment block, short contact tool.
per_unit_reads.quillith: Lean directive figure and side slate.
per_unit_reads.luna: Split stance and single diagonal ligament.
per_unit_reads.sable: Long horizontal rifle and narrow marksman wedge.

role_group_evidence.tanks: Korath's arch/body, Veyra's cocoon, and Malachor's square flesh fortress/clamp do not collide.
role_group_evidence.mages: Cashmere's vertical ledger authority and Luna's diagonal ligament split differ in prop, pose, body line, and emotional strategy.
role_group_evidence.assassins: Pilfer's forward siphon wedge and Creep's radial blade-ring crouch are distinct.
role_group_evidence.supports: Knoll's stamp/block mechanism and Quillith's slate/directive hand remain distinct.
role_group_evidence.marksmen: Nyxa's curved organic time-bow and Sable's straight proof-rifle line remain distinct.
role_group_evidence.brawler: Kett's single plated fist has no same-role collision.

convergence_audit.result: The batch is materially varied in body plan, dominant idea, action vector, face psychology, and role silhouette while retaining one dry western-gothic production language.

nonblocking_excellence_gap: Vellum still exceeds several masters in micro-material separation and ornamental authorship; later polish can widen that ceiling without reopening readiness.
The common dark studio presentation is coherent but leaves room for more palette-range confidence in later production, provided unit-specific color remains disciplined.
Some psychological contradictions rely on face-crop inspection rather than native 96px emotion, which is acceptable because the locked 96px gate is role and identity, not facial microexpression.
summary: READY. The Round 4 immutable cut satisfies the locked contract across all 12 units. All carried Round 3 closure tests pass on direct visual evidence; all required artifacts, hashes, same-master face crops, exact 96px derivatives, comparison boards, psychology records, and harness provenance reconcile. The approved Vellum authority is the hard-matte 10%-real deshined raw hash 824b...c18 plus matching display cutout hash 6f10...6a0; the shiny BiRefNet output is not used. No production blocker or admissible regression was observed, and the lowest critical professional dimension is PROFESSIONAL.
